title: DeadHead
description:
DeadHead is a grave plugin for Minecraft Spigot/Paper. Probably the coolest one out there!

To put it simply, when a player dies, their head drops at the location containing their inventory.
body:
DeadHead is a grave plugin for Minecraft Spigot/Paper, designed for the CivBlock Community Server.

To put it simply, when a player dies, their head drops at the location containing their inventory.

**FEATURES**
- When a player dies DeadHeads drops their player head as an item on the ground, and applies a timer for however many minutes you set in the config.yml
- Heads have the player skin/skull of the player they belong to.
- Heads give off a tiny particle shower, and glow until claimed.
- Heads save in a database and persist through reboots.
- Players can claim their own head instantly.
- Graverobbers must wait an amount of time settable in the config.yml to claim someone else head.
- Players claiming their own head get a small speed buff.
- Graverobbers claiming a head get a weakness debuff.
- Heads cannot be broken by Water, Lava or explosions. 
- /listgrave <playername> will list all of the graves for the player.
- /gravegui <playername> will open a GUI that lists all the graves for the player and allows for one click grave items drop at the DeadHead location!
- If somehow a grave is lost or missing, /givegrave <playername> will restore the items to the player and remove all graves for the given playername.

Permisisons:

deadhead.givegrave   - Allows use of /givegrave <playername> command. Default: op

deadhead.gui  - Gives access to the /graveui <playername> command

deadhead.listgraves - Gives access to the /listgraves command
